subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest unto God! Arise with the power of the love of God, and speak forth in praise of God, and say: O thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المقبل الی الله قم بقوه محبه الله و انطق بالثناء علی الله و قل ایها
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
